prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-ASRO-9IN1SURVIVALKNIFE-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 Multitool Pocket Knife with G10 Handle Bottle Opener Glass Breaker Screwdriver Bit Set, 8.25 Inch Black Description: A durable and reliable survival knife is a must have item to include with survival kits, emergency preparedness items and camping gear; add a multitool function and you'll be well equipped for challenges, tasks and repairs that may cross your path when out in the wilderness. This particular ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 pocket knife features the following: spring assisted folding blade with helpful thumb rise, window punch, 6pc interchangeable screwdriver bit set, gut hook knife and wire cutter, bottle opener, hex wrench, spoke wrench, regular wrench, flat head screwdriver and built in belt clip for on person carrying and easy accessibility.

A unique feature of this pocket knife is its G10 exterior handle finish (glass based epoxy resin laminate to be specific); this fabrication ensures long lasting durability, strength and endurance, standing up to all the wear and tear you throw its way. Importantly, the G10 finish also makes this survival knife highly water resistant, meaning it can be used in wet conditions time and time again, and its long term performance will not be affected. In addition to its durable stainless steel and G10 construction, this ASR Outdoor pocket knife or tactical knife comes with a handy nylon multitool sheath for safe storage and protection when not in use or when traveling. The nylon case features a secure Velcro closure, exterior Velcro closing storage compartment for bits, and a key ring loop or belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options.

All the tools built in to this pocket knife make it not only a reliable item to include with survival kits and when camping, but is also suitable to carry for hiking, hunting, fishing, biking, trekking, as an EDC knife and even to help around the house with home improvement. The folding pocket knife multitool makes great gifts for men and any outdoor enthusiasts, stocking stuffers, fathers day gifts, gifts for brother, gifts for husband and more. Search Terms: hunting fishing hiking trekking camping gear emergency preparedness items tools multitool knives EDC tactical knife survival kits gifts for men brother gifts husband birthday gift window punch home improvement stocking stuffers brother gifts Features: - 9 in 1 MULTITOOL POCKET KNIFE: This formidable survival knife will keep you prepared and equipped in the great outdoors; the pocket knife features a spring assisted folding blade with helpful thumb rise, window punch, 6pc interchangeable screwdriver bit set, gut hook knife and wire cutters, bottle opener, hex wrench, spoke wrench, regular wrench, flat head screwdriver and built in belt clip - G10 KNIFE HANDLE: Featuring a G10 handle, this fabrication ensures long lasting durability, strength and endurance against tons of wear and tear; the G10 finish also makes this survival knife highly water resistant meaning it can be used in wet conditions time and time again that will not affect its long term performance - VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: All the tools built in to this pocket knife make it not only a reliable item to include with survival kits and when camping but is also suitable to carry for hiking, hunting, fishing, biking, trekking, asan EDC knife and even home improvement - MULTITOOL SHEATH: This stainless steel folding pocket knife comes with a nylon pouch for safe storage when not in use; the case features a secure Velcro closure, exterior velcro closing storage compartment for bits, and a key ring loop or belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.25 x 1.25 x 1 inch; Blade Length: 3.5 inches; Material: Stainless Steel; Color: Black; Weight: 0.5lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
